title: Best Y Levels for Ores
quickAnswer: Quick guide: diamonds around Y -58, redstone deep deepslate, lapis in deeper caves, iron around Y 16 or mountain terrain, coal high in mountains, gold lower down or in badlands, and copper around mid-height caves.
keyFacts: Diamonds improve the deeper you go, but lava risk rises near the bottom layers.
Iron and coal both benefit from mountain biomes because high terrain shifts their best generation bands upward.
Lapis, gold, and copper are often faster to find by caving than strict strip mining because exposed cave walls reveal more blocks.
Use this as a lookup article, then switch to tool and route planning for efficient runs.
commonMistakes: Using pre-1.18 mining advice for modern terrain generation.
Mining only one height everywhere instead of changing strategy by ore type and biome.
